FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Hormuz Crisis Spurs Oil Shock Fears; Yen Vulnerability Intensifies
tldr_points: Hormuz Strait confrontation triggers 1970s-style oil shock fears
Japan's oil import dependency renders yen structurally vulnerable
Geopolitical risk premium supports USD against risk-sensitive yen
FX.excerpt: Oil shock risk drives USD/JPY higher as Hormuz crisis mirrors 1970s supply shocks
FX.comment: Oil shock risk from Hormuz crisis favors USD over energy-import-dependent yen

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] FLAT: Market Holds as AI Leaders and Geopolitical Risks Dominate
tldr_points: AI stock movements dominate the news
Iran war developments keep S&P 500 in a holding pattern
Bank of America’s warning adds caution
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 remains flat amid AI sector gains and geopolitical uncertainties, with prospects of a breakout pending event-driven catalysts.
STOCKS.comment: Market remains flat amid AI sector gains and geopolitical uncertainties; wait for a catalyst to drive a directional move.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: BTC consolidates near MA20 with rising volume
RSI remains bullish despite overbought concerns
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC trades near MA20 as Circle's 20% surge and stablecoin reforms boost liquidity, indicating upside potential.
CRYPTO.comment: BTC shows bullish bias as fundamentals improve and technicals hold above MA20.
